issues.title: Low Lighthouse performance score
issues.detail: Large hero assets and blocking JS delay first render.

issues.title: Low mobile tap target coverage
issues.detail: Interactive elements are sparse on mobile above the fold.

issues.title: No lead form detected
issues.detail: No clear lead capture form present on primary landing page.

issues.title: Missing meta description
issues.detail: Search snippets are not optimized for click-through.

issues.title: Heading hierarchy issue
issues.detail: Multiple H1s reduce content clarity for users and crawlers.

recommendations.action: Compress hero media and defer non-critical scripts
recommendations.rationale: Fast load speed improves engagement and ad conversion efficiency.

recommendations.action: Add a short above-the-fold lead form with one primary CTA
recommendations.rationale: Reduces friction and captures intent before drop-off.

recommendations.action: Increase mobile CTA button prominence and spacing
recommendations.rationale: Improves tap confidence and mobile funnel progression.

recommendations.action: Add unique meta descriptions on key pages
recommendations.rationale: Improves SERP CTR and qualified traffic volume.
Strengthens readability and SEO signal structure.

summary: Sample fallback report loaded. This demonstrates scoring, issues, and prioritized action planning when live internet conditions are unstable during judging.
